# Chapter 2: Statics of rigid bodies  (~100 pp)
- 2.1 Equilibrium conditions (10) · 2.2 Trusses: method of joints, method of sections (15) · 2.3 Frames and machines (15) · 2.4 Distributed loads (12) · 2.5 Centroids and moments of area (12) · 2.6 Internal forces: shear, moment, axial (15) · 2.7 Worked examples: bridge truss, crane (10) · 2.8 Failure section: pin connections, bolted joints, missed load paths (11)

**Archetype**: balance. **Project**: design and analyse a small wooden truss; build it; load it to failure. **Exercises**: 40.
